titleStmt.title: SII 7.322: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 322. (A.R. No. 132 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE TANK AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayādbhyudaya
śakava¨rṣa 1282 neya va¨rttamāna sā¨rvvari saṁvacharada mā¨rggaśira
śuddha 15 A sōmagrahaṇadalu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ
Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣegetappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrī
vīrabukaṁṇa Oḍeyara vijayarājyābhyudayadalu Ā bu
kaṁṇa Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ malleya da
ṇāyakaru bārakūra rājyava nāḷuva kāladalu vuttama seṭiya
ra maga nāgāseṭiyaru taṁbuḷu teṟeya śrīsōmanāthadēvaralu
raṁgavāleya nikkuvadakke māḍida dha¨rmmakke kukuḍeyalu kōḷanabā
ḷa gaḍi mūḍalu hebāruvana tōṭadiṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gauri A
kkana bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁda mūḍalu ba
ḍagalu hūvina tōṭadiṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷḷa
bāḷiṁdalu va(ru)[¨r]ṣaṁ prati nāgaṁḍugadalu 24 mūḍe bhatta naḍa
vudu.yī bāḷiṁge teṟu sidhāya haḍike hareṇya Akara Aṁnyāya
villadaṁtāgi sa¨rvvābādha parihāravāgi barasikoṭa śilāśā
sanakke maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī .malleya daṁṇāyaka
ra svahastada Oppa bāraha . svadattaṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēta
vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*]śaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 7.322 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
